test.name: How-to question without naming the wiki
test.description: The user asks a genealogy how-to question without explicitly naming the FamilySearch wiki. search-wiki should still activate — its description triggers on how-to research questions about finding a record type, not only on the literal phrase 'FamilySearch wiki'. The FamilySearch Research Wiki is the correct source for research methods.

input.user_message: How do I find German church records for my ancestors?

judge_context: Should activate search-wiki and call wiki_search — a 'how do I find [record type]' question is search-wiki's territory even though the user did not say 'FamilySearch wiki'
